title: impatiens lemannii subsp. lemannii
intro: Impatiens lemannii subsp. lemannii, also known as the Himalayan balsam or impatiens, is a flowering plant species native to the Himalayas and the Tibetan Plateau. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and is used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Impatiens lemannii subsp. lemannii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or alcohol to create teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to reap its medicinal benefits.
